requirements.title: CRC Streaming Update
requirements.description: Each CRC function shall accept a running CRC value, data buffer, and size, returning the updated CRC value.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC Null Safety
requirements.description: Each CRC function shall return 0 when passed a NULL data pointer.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC Zero Length Safety
requirements.description: Each CRC function shall return 0 when passed a zero data size.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-16 ARC
requirements.description: The CRC module shall compute a CRC-16/ARC update with initial seed 0.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-16 BinHex
requirements.description: The CRC module shall compute a BinHex 16-bit CRC update with initial seed 0.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-16 CCITT
requirements.description: The CRC module shall compute a CRC-16/CCITT update with initial seed 0xFFFF.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-16 Kermit
requirements.description: The CRC module shall compute a CRC-16/Kermit update with initial seed 0.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-32 CCITT32
requirements.description: The CRC module shall compute a 32-bit CCITT CRC update with initial seed 0xFFFFFFFF.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-32 ZIP
requirements.description: The CRC module shall compute a CRC-32/ZIP update with initial seed 0xFFFFFFFF.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.

requirements.title: CRC-32 ZIP Final XOR
requirements.description: The CRC-32/ZIP function shall apply a final XOR of 0xFFFFFFFF to the computed value when data is processed.
requirements.rationale: Enables data integrity verification for communication and storage in embedded systems.
